title: Malvil-tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Malvil-trees''' were at least semi-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] [[Tree/Legends|trees]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]]. They had tendrils that they could move about and that could detect temperature and heat. They grew up to a hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and could lived up to a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. They produced the purple-black spore clouds that shrouded Xagobah. These spores were contained in globes that grew from the trees' stalk. Malvil-trees had a special symbiotic relationship with the [[Xamster/Legends|Xamsters]]. They harvested the Malvils' spore-globes and used them as a camouflage agent. Organic life-forms couldn't see through the haze produced by the spores, and neither could droids. The spores reflected light too high on the spectrum for [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to register through their optics. They were able attack threats and imprint harmless beings so other trees wouldn't attack them. A known member of this [[Species/Legends|species]] was [[Malubi]] who, along with the Xamster [[Xeran]], encountered [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on the planet during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] was responsible for [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineering]] the trees to create the [[Mazariyan]] Citadel. The once gentle trees were perverted to kill things without feeding on them. They exploited their spores to camouflage their vessels such as [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] and a [[Robot ramship|ramship]]. When war came to Xagobah, the Malvils began to die due to neglect and loneliness. 

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''
*''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
